Maybe we should send some more names their way. WAGMI Ledger co-founder and former CEO...

We’re still floating from the energy of ApeFest ‘22. Thank you to everyone - our community, the staff, vendors, performers and our sponsor - for making this year’s event so memorable. Scroll the for some of our favorite moments and photos from last week:

Apes, We’ve hit the 1M follower milestone!Join our Twitter Space tomorrow at 9pm ET to celebrate all that has been BAYC over the past year and a half with our co-hosts . Come hang in this celebratory community chat.
ApeCoin Introducing ApeCoin ($APE), a token for culture, gaming, and commerce used to empower a decentralized community building at the forefront of web3.

Crypto’s mascot. My big girl purchase btw Kind of exciting to get back into our eCom roots. We spent years building up our audience, demand, and social proof before seriously doubling down on CPG. The validation and instant sell through of almost everything we have put out in the last 60 days is very gratifying. Just got a penguin  Need to connect with the pudgy family Just joined the Huddle today...

When I say Pengu Morning and you say it back A year ago, I bought my first . Today, I finally became a holder.  Honestly, this feels like a dream come true. Huge love to the Pudgy community for building one of the most positive corners of Web3. Does the Pudgy flock follow its own? SnoopDoge
